NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE REGARDING CONTEMPT OF JUNE 16, 2009 COURT ORDER AND HEARING ON SANCTIONS IN AMOUNT OF $2,580 PER 6/25/09 ORDER IS OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 = (301/PJB)

Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar Jul-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Terrence Mayo, Esq., 415-397-1515 for plaintiff and moving party Duncan Eastwood
Jordan Sussman, Esq. of Downing Law Firm, 415-986-3644 specially appearing for defendant and opposing party Joseph Bandiera

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
HEARING ON ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE REGARDING PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER IS GRANTED; PLAINTIFF IS TO POST AN UNDERTAKING IN THE AMOUNT OF $30,000.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
